political.s: FEC: $27K PAC donations; 46% to Republican, 54% to Democratic committees.  [CA CalAccess + NY COELIG + TX Ethics adds state-level totals.]

charity.s: $145M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.55% of revenue) via Ronald McDonald House Charities.
charity.focus: Children's health, family support (Ronald McDonald House Charities)

environment.s: environmental violation: $60K in federal penalties (Violation Tracker).

labor.s: 77 federal penalties totaling $45.8M since 2000 (Violation Tracker). Supply-chain signals: KnowTheChain 30/100; CHRB 9.5/26; UK MS statement; AU MS statement.

dei.s: EEO-1 workforce demographics on federal record (FY2016, DOL OFCCP FOIA release): 332 US employees — 58.7% women, 18.4% racial/ethnic minorities; management 90.9% women, 18.2% minorities.

animals.s: BBFAW 2024 Tier 3 — established management approach across species; gaps in pork gestation-crate phase-out reporting. Open Wing Alliance: ~80% cage-free progress reported toward 2025 US deadline. [BBFAW Tier 3 · Cage-free on track · MSC certified]

privacy.s: Terms-of-service privacy grade E (very poor) via ToS;DR (tosdr.org), CC BY-SA 3.0 — transformed to TruNorth's scale.

execPay.s: CEO-to-median-worker pay ratio 82:1 (median employee pay $19,020; CEO total compensation $10K) — SEC proxy statement (DEF 14A, 2026).

wiki.parent: The Vanguard Group, BlackRock, State Street Corporation
wiki.industry: quick service restaurant sector, food service, accommodation and food service activities, food and tobacco industry
wiki.keyPeople: Ray Kroc, Richard and Maurice McDonald
wiki.extract: McDonald's Corporation, doing business as McDonald's, is an American multinational fast food restaurant chain. As of 2024, it is the second-largest by number of locations in the world, behind the Chinese chain Mixue Ice Cream & Tea.

cases.caseName: Bernal v. City of Greeley, Colorado

health.s: 7 CPSC recalls on record; sample hazard: choking.

sampleRecords.event_description: Contact with hot objects or substances
sampleRecords.final_narrative: On August 31, 2025, an employee was using a paper towel to wipe down the surface around the perimeter of the fryer. She sneezed and her right arm slipped into the fryer oil. She was hospitalized with burns to her right arm and wrist.

sampleRecords.event_description: Caught or wedged between objects  nonrunning
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was reversing a transport truck out of a parking space when the side mirror of the truck contacted another tractor and it folded inward. The employee went to fold the mirror back out and their left ring finger slipped into a recessed area of the adjusting mechanism, causing the mirror base to amputate his left ring finger.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was carrying a tray out to the lobby when they slipped and fell on a wet floor that had just been mopped. The employee sustained a broken hip and required surgery.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee walked across the recently mopped floor in the lobby to carry a tray to a customer. The employee slipped and fell on the wet floor, resulting in hospitalization for a broken right hip that required surgery.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall to lower level resulting from exposure or contact  less than 6 feet
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was gathering product to open for business. When she stepped onto a pallet with shrink wrap on it, her foot got tangled in the shrink wrap and she fell to the floor. The employee sustained a fractured left hip.

tax.citation: Verified source: Institute on Taxation & Economic Policy (ITEP)

topHazards.label: Components inside of the whistle can detach, posing choking and aspiration hazards to young children.
The designs on the glasses contain cadmium. Long term exposure to cadmium can cause adverse health effects.
The paint on some of the figurines contains excess levels of lead. If ingested over time by children, the lead from the paint may present a lead poisoning haza…
The bug's antenna can break off, posing a choking hazard to young children.

sampleRecalls.title: McDonald's Recalls Hello Kitty Themed Whistles Due to Choking and Aspiration Hazards
sampleRecalls.description: The recalled whistles are red and were included in a plastic Hello Kitty figurine holding a pink heart-shaped lollipop. The whistle can be removed and used to make sounds by inhaling or exhaling through the mouthpiece. When closed, the figurine measures about 3 inches in height and width and 1 3/4 inches in depth. The…
hazards: Components inside of the whistle can detach, posing choking and aspiration hazards to young children.
injuries: McDonald's has received two reports of children who coughed out pieces of the whistle that they had sucked into their mouths, including one child who received medical attention.
units: About 2.3 million in the U.S. In addition, about 200,000 were distributed in Canada.

sampleRecalls.title: McDonald's Recalls Movie Themed Drinking Glasses Due to Potential Cadmium Risk
sampleRecalls.description: The "Shrek Forever After 3D" collectable drinking glass are 16-ounce glasses that came in four designs, Shrek, Fiona, Puss n' Boots, and Donkey.
hazards: The designs on the glasses contain cadmium. Long term exposure to cadmium can cause adverse health effects.
products: Shrek Forever After 3D Collectable Drinking Glasses

sampleRecalls.title: CPSC, McDonald's Corp. and Bobble Dreams USA Announce Recall of Chicago Bears Bobble Head Figurines
sampleRecalls.description: The recalled bobble head figurines are designed in the likeness of NFL players Brian Urlacher and Anthony Thomas. The 7-inch tall figurines have heads on springs that cause them to bobble from side to side. The figurines are dressed in Chicago Bears' uniforms. The McDonald's logo and the player's name are printed acro…
hazards: The paint on some of the figurines contains excess levels of lead. If ingested over time by children, the lead from the paint may present a lead poisoning haza…
injuries: McDonald's has not received any reports of injuries or incidents involving these figurines. This recall is being conducted to prevent the possibility of injury.

sampleRecalls.title: CPSC, McDonald's Announce Recall of "Scooter Bug" Happy Meal Toys
sampleRecalls.description: The Scooter Bug toy is about 3 inches long and 2-1/2 inch wide. When rolled across the floor, the bug's legs move back and forth. The bug has a yellow face with red antennas, orange feet and a purple body with green spots. The words "Fisher Price" are on the top of the toy. The words "MFG.FOR MCD CORP.CHINA" are on th…
hazards: The bug's antenna can break off, posing a choking hazard to young children.
injuries: McDonald's has received two reports of children choking and one report of a child gagging on the broken off antenna.

sampleRecalls.title: CPSC And McDonald's Notice Of Doc DeLorean Exchange
sampleRecalls.description: MAY 8, 1992 Release # 92-083 CPSC And McDonald's Notice Of Doc DeLorean Exchange PRODUCT: "Doc DeLorean Cars" distributed by McDonald's as part of its "Back to the Future" Happy Meal program. PROBLEM: Nine children removed the rear tires from the cars. WHAT TO DO: Parents who have young children who might put this toy…
products: McDonald's Back to the Future Happy Meal Doc DeLorean Car toys
